registers.name: TZSC_MPCWM4ACFGR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region A watermark configuration register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region A watermark configuration register.

fields.name: SREN
fields.description: Sub-region z enable.

fields.name: SRLOCK
fields.description: Sub-region z lock This bit, once set, can be cleared only by a system reset.

fields.name: PRIV
fields.description: Privileged sub-region z This bit is taken into account only if SREN is set.

registers.name: TZSC_MPCWM4AR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region A watermark register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region A watermark register.

fields.name: SUBA_START
fields.description: Start of sub-region A This field defines the address offset of the sub-region A, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table 16.

fields.name: SUBA_LENGTH
fields.description: Length of sub-region A This field defines the length of the sub-region A, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table 16. When SUBA_START + SUBA_LENGTH is higher than the maximum size allowed for the memory, a saturation of SUBA_LENGTH is applied automatically. If SUBA_LENGTH = 0, the sub-region A is disabled (SREN bit in TZSC_MPCMWACFGR is cleared).

registers.name: TZSC_MPCWM4BCFGR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region B watermark configuration register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region B watermark configuration register.

fields.name: SREN
fields.description: Sub-region z enable.

fields.name: SRLOCK
fields.description: Sub-region z lock This bit, once set, can be cleared only by a system reset.

fields.name: PRIV
fields.description: Privileged sub-region z This bit is taken into account only if SREN is set.

registers.name: TZSC_MPCWM4BR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region B watermark register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC BKPSRAM sub-region B watermark register.

fields.name: SUBB_START
fields.description: Start of sub-region B This field defines the address offset of the sub-region B, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table 16.

fields.name: SUBB_LENGTH
fields.description: Length of sub-region B This field defines the length of the sub-region B, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table 16. When SUBB_START + SUBB_LENGTH is higher than the maximum size allowed for the memory, a saturation of SUBB_LENGTH is applied automatically. If SUBB_LENGTH = 0, the sub-region B is disabled (SREN bit in TZSC_MPCMWBCFGR is cleared).
